md5Hash.title: Hash Calculator
md5Hash.desc: Generate MD5 / SHA-256 hash of a string
md5Hash.sha256Warning: MD5 is vulnerable to collision attacks and should not be used for password storage or security purposes. Only use for general data integrity verification.

wordToPdf.title: Word to PDF
wordToPdf.dropzone: Click or drag Word file here
wordToPdf.successMsg: File converted successfully and download started!
wordToPdf.error: Conversion failed. Please ensure the file format is correct.
wordToPdf.hint1: Currently only supports .docx format Word documents.
wordToPdf.hint2: Conversion is done locally in your browser. Your files are never uploaded to any server, ensuring privacy.
wordToPdf.hint3: Complex layouts (such as tables, special fonts) may have slight differences after conversion.
